item.title: Docker client wrapper
steps: Create src/docker/ package (client.ts, build.ts, compose.ts, hardening.ts per ARCHITECTURE.md)
In client.ts: implement DockerClient class with methods: build, up, down, restart, ps, logs, inspect, networkLs — each wraps docker/docker-compose CLI via child_process or execa
Capture and parse stdout/stderr into typed result objects
Implement health polling: poll container health status with configurable timeout and interval using async/await
Implement image inspection: check if image exists, get layer info for two-stage build verification
Add typed error classes for common failures (DaemonNotRunning, ImageNotFound, PortConflict)
Write unit tests using subprocess mocking (jest.mock or vitest mock for child_process/execa)
acceptanceCriteria: DockerClient correctly wraps docker CLI commands via subprocess (not SDK)
Health polling returns structured status within configurable timeout
Errors are typed and actionable (not raw stderr strings)
Unit tests pass without requiring a running Docker daemon
All async methods accept AbortSignal for cancellation
